allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);['screen-menu','screen-race','screen-results','hidden-input','lanes','passage','countdown-num','scoreboard'].forEach\(id=>{if\(!h.includes\('id=\\"'+id+'\\"'\)\)console.log\('MISSING id',id\)}\);console.log\('HTML id check done'\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('game.js','utf8'\); const n=\(s.match\(/\\"[^\\"]{60,}\\.\\"/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\('long passages ~', \(s.match\(/^    \\"/gm\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('has passageBag:', s.includes\('passageBag'\)\); console.log\('has updateScroll:', s.includes\('updateScroll'\)\); console.log\('has dialog open:', s.includes\('screens.results.classList.add'\)\);")
